The '''''Trenchant''-class cruiser''' was manufactured by [[Merkuni Drives]].

==History==
[[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]] used a modified ''Trenchant''-class cruiser, the [[Ironhand (Trenchant-class)|''Ironhand'']], as his personal transport.
